description_long: This is a bust-style doll depicting a bald humanoid figure with exaggerated, pointed ears and a pronounced brow. The skin is a pale, peachy tone with blue painted markings across the forehead and down the face, giving it a distinctive, almost tribal appearance. The eyes are deeply set and the eyebrows are thick and dark, contributing to a stern, intense expression. The doll wears a brown garment with a quilted texture and white polka dots, trimmed with a lighter brown collar. The back of the head features a prominent blue V-shaped marking, and the ears protrude outward. The overall craftsmanship suggests a stylized, fantasy-inspired character, possibly an elf or goblin.
description: A bust-style doll of a bald, pointed-eared humanoid with blue facial markings and a brown, polka-dotted garment. The face is stern and detailed, with a fantasy-inspired design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's stern face, blue markings, pointed ears, and quilted brown garment.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the ear's shape, facial profile, and the blue marking extending across the head.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the V-shaped blue marking on the bald head and the full pattern of the brown garment.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the ear, facial profile, and blue head marking.
attribute_clothing_style: Quilted brown bust garment with white polka dots and a light brown collar, resembling a fantasy or medieval tunic.
attribute_pose: The doll is a bust with a static, upright torso and head facing forward; no arms or legs are visible.
attribute_facial_expression: Frowning expression with furrowed brows, downturned mouth, and intense, focused eyes.
attribute_hair_style: Bald head with blue painted markings forming a V-shape at the back and a stripe across the forehead.
